content: We can reframe the intrinsic curiosity module's (ICM) prediction error intrinsic reward signal as an uncertainty scoring metric to guide memory sample selection for deep active agents, creating a curiosity-driven active learning loop that only retains high-uncertainty, reward-dense experiences for future policy updates. This combined system automatically prunes low-information trivial experiences while prioritizing the surprising, unpredicted states that drive both faster exploration and more efficient memory usage.
source_topics: Uncertainty-based memory sample selection for deep active agents
